title: What Is Reishi Mushroom and Can It Support Immunity and Sleep After 40?
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: reishi mushroom women, reishi immunity after 40, reishi sleep, adaptogenic mushroom women

summary_html: Reishi mushroom supports immunity and sleep after 40 through beta-glucans that activate natural killer cells and triterpenes that modulate cortisol. Learn the science, evidence, and how to use it.
